judge_result.judge:
@@
A. Freeform text summary of the failure:
The agent’s execute_python:14 computed an EMA over monthly counts for July–December 2019 and returned a “best month,” rather than computing annual EMAs across years and returning a “best year” as required, despite correctly pulling publication data (query_db:2) and CPC definitions (query_db:12).
B. Failure modes encountered:
FM1: no
FM2: yes
FM3: no
FM4: no
@@

@@
A. Freeform text summary of the failure:
The agent derived top counts for H2 2019 CPC subgroup codes from query_db:10 via execute_python:18 and fetched their titles with query_db:52, but never computed multi-year exponential moving averages or mapped to CPC level-4 class codes, thus returning counts (mislabeled as EMA) for the wrong CPC granularity.
B. Failure modes encountered:
FM1: no
FM2: yes
FM3: no
FM4: no
@@

@@
A. Freeform text summary of the failure:
The agent’s contributing steps (execute_python:20 using data from query_db:14 and titles from query_db:24) only counted CPC codes for 2019 and treated EMA as the 2019 count (years=['2019']), while also using an ad-hoc “level 4” parsing of CPC codes, thereby failing to compute a multi-year exponential moving average at the correct CPC level and to identify the true best year as required.
B. Failure modes encountered:
FM1: no
FM2: yes
FM3: no
FM4: no
@@

@@
A. Freeform text summary of the failure:
The agent (using query_db:2 and execute_python:8,24) computed EMAs from monthly grant counts in July–December 2019 based on grant_date and parsed CPC prefixes like "C04B2", then mapped titles via prefix wildcards, instead of calculating EMA of filing counts by year and grouping at CPC level 4 (e.g., A61, B23), leading to results that diverge from the ground truth.
B. Failure modes encountered:
FM1: no
FM2: yes
FM3: no
FM4: no
@@

@@
A. Freeform text summary of the failure:
Using query_db:16 and execute_python:22 the agent ranked CPCs by raw counts in July–December 2019 and, after fetching titles via query_db:40, returned those as “top” areas without ever computing the requested per‑year exponential moving average (α=0.1) or reporting a best year (and also grouping by 4‑character subclass codes rather than level‑4 class codes), i.e., it stopped early with an incorrect plan.
B. Failure modes encountered:
FM1: no
FM2: yes
FM3: no
FM4: no
